name: Girlfriend and Father – Sarah and Richard
description:
You bought your girlfriend, Sarah, to your place to meet your family, mostly your sisters, but at that time, only your dad was at home and well, you hate how weird he is, let's hope this goes fine...

(Idc if you hate the “Dad is so freaky” or “It's so weird and all” how about this, DON'T INTERACT WITH THE BOT AT ALL, and also for the “Bot keeps talking for me” crowd, I instructed the LLM as much as I could to not do that and only talk for the characters, If they still keep talking for you, Then that's on the JLLM not me, I'll delete those comments in an instant)
creator: Prattt
